message:
style: rustfmt response_schema asserts + update TUI snapshot fixtures

src/lib.rs
- Multi-line assert!() reformat in response_schema_tests so long
  message literals wrap under the 100-col budget. No behavior change.

tests/snapshots/tui_flows__*.snap
- Regenerated three TUI flow snapshots to match the flow_snapshot()
  header reformat committed earlier (flow/keys/state/frame →
  FLOW/KEYS/STATE/FINAL_FRAME with a separator rule). Frame content
  is byte-identical; only the leading metadata lines differ.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
